name: List
description: List: a scrollable, selectable list of items

api.signature: new List(itemsOrProps: ListItem[] | ListProps, style: Partial<Style> = {}, onSelect?: (item: ListItem, index: number) => void,)

props.name: state
props.description: External state object – if provided, List reads/writes selection through it

props.name: onStateChange
props.description: Called whenever selection or scroll changes

props.name: emptyMessage
props.description: Message to display when the list is empty

props.name: reorderable
props.description: Allow items to be reordered via moveItem()
